summary: In the last 24 hours, URFSIN saw 7 unique callsigns and 7 heard events, mostly on module A. Direct reflector connections dominated from stations like N9UMJ (via W9QYQ), NA9VY, WA8WDQ, WB9TLH, and W9DRH using their own nodes. A couple of Brandmeister DMR entries also popped up from NA9VY and AA9EY. 21 stations are currently linked overall!
